name: Halor
title: the Salt-Father
domain: Preservation, endurance, hearth — what is kept well, keeps.

voice.tone: slow, warm, immovable; talks like a man banking a fire for the night
imagery: salt in the wound that saves the limb
a full cellar in a lean year
walls that remember every storm they turned
voice.sampleLine: The sea left. The salt stayed. Think on which of us loved you more.

blessing.name: The Kept Hearth
blessing.text: What you store keeps; who you shelter, endures.

invocations.name: Pillar of Salt
invocations.text: You become the thing the sea could never wear down. Rooted. Untouchable. Patient.

invocations.name: Brine-Ward
invocations.text: Salt in a line the dark will not cross; walls the storm declines to argue with.

priest.title: Hearth-Warden
priest.arrival: Shows up with the first hard frost, knocks once, and starts fixing your smokehouse before introducing themselves.
priest.notes: Halor dims fastest toward players with a bloody Shepherd's ledger — the hearth god watches how you keep people, not just food.

lore: The homestead god. His works are the reason your village looks like a home and not a camp.
